name: Copy button
goal: Provide a one-click copy-to-clipboard trigger that targets any element by id or CSS selector and reports success via a CustomEvent.
description: A button paired with another element by `for=<id>` (or selector). Reads the target's textContent (or input/textarea value), writes it to the system clipboard via the Clipboard API, and falls back to a hidden textarea + execCommand path when the modern API is unavailable. The button briefly switches to the copied-label and dispatches ce-copy { text, ok }.

props.name: for
props.description: Element id (preferred) or CSS selector identifying what to copy.

props.name: copiedLabel
props.description: Label shown for ~1.5s after a successful copy.

events.name: ce-copy
events.description: Fires after every click attempt; ok=false when the target was missing or both clipboard paths failed.

globalDependencies.purpose: Primary path to copy resolved text to the system clipboard.
Legacy fallback when the Clipboard API is unavailable or rejects.
Resolve the `for` attribute as a bare id.
Resolve the `for` attribute as a CSS selector when it doesn't match a bare id.

sideEffects.description: Transient hidden <textarea> injected during the execCommand fallback path.
sideEffects.reason: Required for the legacy copy implementation when Clipboard API is unavailable.

sideEffects.description: 1500 ms setTimeout reverts the copied label.

a11y.notes: Native <button>; aria-label mirrors the visible text and switches to the copied label briefly after success.
